docs.name: Morphing Card Stack
docs.description: An interactive collection of cards that smoothly layout-morphs between Stack, Grid, and List configurations using Framer Motion springs.

props.name: cards
props.description: Array of CardData containing id, title, description, icon, and optional color.

props.name: onCardClick
props.description: Callback function triggered when clicking a card.

variants.label: Default

docs.overview: MorphingCardStack displays a set of cards that morph between Stack (swipeable fan), Grid, and List layout modes using shared layout animations. The top card in stack mode is draggable to cycle through cards.

scenarios.title: Feature showcase carousel
scenarios.description: Present key product features as a swipeable stack that users can fan into a grid for an overview.

scenarios.title: Kanban-style task switcher
scenarios.description: Start in list layout for a compact task view and let users switch to grid for a spatial overview.
